StmtSimple.StatementText: SELECT cntrycode, COUNT(*) AS numcust, SUM(c_acctbal) AS totacctbal FROM (SELECT LEFT(c_phone,2) AS cntrycode, c_acctbal FROM tpch_sf1.customer WHERE LEFT(c_phone,2) IN ('10', '17', '19', '23', '22', '31', '27') AND c_acctbal > (SELECT AVG(c_acctbal) FROM tpch_sf1.customer WHERE c_acctbal > 0.00 AND LEFT(c_phone,2) IN ('10', '17', '19', '23', '22', '31', '27')) AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT * FROM tpch_sf1.orders WHERE o_custkey = c_custkey)) AS custsale GROUP BY cntrycode ORDER BY cntrycode

ScalarOperator.ScalarString: CASE WHEN [globalagg1017]=(0) THEN NULL ELSE [globalagg1019]/CONVERT_IMPLICIT(decimal(19,0),[globalagg1017],0) END
